extortion.description: Established in 1969, Dunbier Marine Products has been manufacturing boat trailers for all types of Australian Boaties for over 50 years, building its reputation on quality, strength and reliability. With the Head Office situated in Braeside (Melbourne), Dunbier services the Australian market through 5 interstate offices, as well as an experienced and dedicated dealer network. Dunbier are proudly Australian family owned, operated and our trailers still made in Australia. With our support network across the country, you can feel safe knowing that we are there with you, wherever you go.
